Column Definitions

customer_email

Unique customer. One row per customer — this is aggregated profile data, not order-level.

rmkt_emails_sent

Total remarketing emails sent to this customer.

first_order_date

Date of the customer's very first order (any store).

last_order_date

Date of the customer's most recent order.

total_po

Total purchase orders placed lifetime, across all stores combined.

total_revenue

Lifetime gross revenue across all stores combined. Not store-specific.

last_order_store_domain

Store where the customer placed their most recent order only. Does not reflect all stores they have ordered from.

po_count / revenue

Equal to total_po / total_revenue in this dataset — no per-store breakdown available.

mode_product_line

The product line the customer has ordered most frequently (across all stores).

returned_po_count / return_rate

Returns across all stores. return_rate = returned_po_count / total_po

How Metrics Are Calculated

Avg / Median LTV

Mean and median of total_revenue. Includes revenue from ALL stores, not just the last one.

avg_ltv = mean(total_revenue)

Avg Lifetime Orders

Mean of total_po — orders across all stores combined. Cannot be broken down per store without order-level data.

avg_orders = mean(total_po)

Order Distribution

Histogram of total_po bucketed into: 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6–10 / 10+

Customer Status

Based on days since last_order_date vs reference date (2026-05-23).

New: ≤30d | Active: 31–90d At Risk: 91–180d | Inactive: 181–365d Churned: >365d

RFM Segments

Quartile-based R (recency), F (frequency=total_po), M (monetary=total_revenue) scoring 1–4.

Champions: R=4,F≥3,M≥3 Loyal: R≥3,F≥3 | New: R=4,F≤2 Potential: R≥3,F≤2 | At Risk: R=2,F≥3 Need Attention: R=2,F≤2 Lost Champions: R=1,F≥3 | Lost: R=1,F≤2

LTV Tiers

Low: <$100 | Mid: $100–$300 High: $300–$700 | VIP: $700+

Likely Converted (Our Stores)

Proxy — cannot determine exactly without order-level data.

gap_days > 60 AND emails_sent > 25 → was in RMKT pool before buying from us

Likely Native (Our Stores)

Proxy for customers who likely found us directly.

gap_days ≤ 30 AND emails_sent ≤ 15

Cross-sell Pool

Customers at OTHER stores whose mode_product_line matches our store's primary products. These are unconverted RMKT targets.

⚠ Store-level caveats

total_po, total_revenue, return_rate at store level reflect the customer's LIFETIME across ALL stores — not just their activity at that specific store.
